UpdateRecord.clientToken: Idempotency token, ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateRecord.type: Record type; supported: A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, PTR, SRV
UpdateRecord.priority: MX record priority, range [0, 100]; required when record type is MX
